command: conda run -n vllm_moe python scripts/moe_affinity/build_moe_router_event_trace.py --model-path models/Mixtral-8x7B-Instruct-v0.1 --model-name mixtral8x7b --request-file data/prompts/wrec_dolly_debug_n64.jsonl --output logs/processed/wrec/mixtral8x7b_dolly_probe_router_events_n1_20260430.jsonl --stats-output results/wrec/mixtral8x7b_offload_probe_n1_20260430.json --failure-output results/wrec/mixtral8x7b_offload_probe_failures_n1_20260430.jsonl --limit 1 --max-input-tokens 128 --phase prefill --dtype float16 --device-map auto --max-memory 0=22GiB,1=22GiB,cpu=96GiB --offload-folder models/offload/mixtral8x7b --continue-on-error
error_summary: Transformers loaded 291/291 weights, then OOMed on GPU1 during automatic Mixtral expert gate_up_proj conversion/finalization. The run did not reach request prefill or router event extraction.
conclusion: The initial Mixtral probe failed before trace collection because 22GiB per GPU left insufficient headroom for Transformers' loading/conversion step. A retry should wait until GPU0 is fully released and use lower GPU max_memory, for example 0=20GiB,1=20GiB, plus PYTORCH_ALLOC_CONF=expandable_segments:True.
